## Domain + concept

<!-- e.g. psychology, concept #3 "Anchoring" -->

## What's wrong

<!-- The specific claim, sentence, or status badge that needs to change. -->

## Source

<!-- The paper, book, or authoritative web page that supports your correction.
     URLs only to real, stable canonical pages. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- Optional: paste the corrected sentence. If you can open a PR with the
     change, even better. -->

## Status badge

- [ ] Current badge is wrong (settled → debated, or debated → framework, etc.)
- [ ] No badge change needed; just a wording fix
